# BetweenHorizontalEnd

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::BetweenHorizontalEnd;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        BetweenHorizontalEnd { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```
